name: Manga Fukidashi / Comic man
description:
Characters here at 18 years of age / 3-A Vs 3-B, even so, please don’t assume it’s for sexual purposes! They’re just here to be comedic / fun. Thank you!

(I’m aware it says 1-A / 1B in the message, it just feels too weird to say 3A / 3B)
creator: Wisp03
